song.stylePromptPlaceholder: Pop, melancholic, perfect for a rainy night
song.lyricsAutoPlaceholder: Lyrics will be generated from your style prompt

validation.styleRequired: Style prompt is required for instrumental
validation.lyricsRequired: Lyrics are required unless auto-generate is enabled

cover.referenceAudioHint: 6 seconds to 6 minutes, max 50 MB. MP3, WAV, FLAC, etc.
cover.coverStylePlaceholder: Jazz, smooth, late night lounge, saxophone
cover.lyricsPlaceholder:
[Verse]
Type or paste your lyrics here…
cover.lyricsHint: 10–1000 characters. Type your own lyrics, or use the button below to pre-fill from the reference track.

validation.styleMin: Style prompt must be at least 10 characters
validation.styleMax: Style prompt must be at most 300 characters
validation.referenceRequired: Reference audio file or URL is required
validation.lyricsMin: Lyrics must be at least 10 characters
validation.lyricsMax: Lyrics must be at most 1000 characters

tts.speechTextPlaceholder: Enter the text you want spoken…
tts.charCount: {{count}}/{{max}} characters. Up to 1000 characters per generation.
tts.voicePromptPlaceholder: gentle female voice, calm and warm
tts.voicePromptHint: Describe the voice you want. Use this instead of a sample, or provide a sample to clone.
tts.voiceSampleHint: 10 seconds to 5 minutes, max 20 MB. MP3, M4A, or WAV. Takes priority over voice description.

validation.textMax: Speech text must be at most {{max}} characters
validation.voiceSourceRequired: Voice sample or voice description is required
validation.voicePromptMax: Voice description must be at most {{max}} characters

result.emptySong: Generate a track to hear the result here.
result.emptyCover: Generate a cover to hear the result here.
result.emptyTts: Generate speech to hear the result here.
result.loadingSong: Generating music — this may take a few minutes…
result.loadingTts: Generating speech — this may take a minute…

errors.TITLE_TOO_LONG: Title must be at most {{max}} characters
errors.STYLE_PROMPT_REQUIRED_INSTRUMENTAL: Style prompt is required for instrumental music
errors.STYLE_PROMPT_TOO_LONG: Style prompt must be at most {{max}} characters
errors.LYRICS_REQUIRED: Lyrics are required unless auto-generate is enabled
errors.LYRICS_TOO_LONG: Lyrics must be at most {{max}} characters
errors.REFERENCE_AUDIO_REQUIRED: Reference audio URL or file is required
errors.REFERENCE_AUDIO_BOTH: Provide either reference audio URL or file, not both
errors.REFERENCE_AUDIO_TOO_LARGE: Reference audio must be at most {{maxMB}} MB
errors.COVER_FEATURE_WITH_AUDIO: coverFeatureId cannot be used with reference audio
errors.COVER_LYRICS_LENGTH: Lyrics must be 10–1000 characters for advanced cover
errors.SPEECH_TEXT_TOO_LONG: Speech text must be at most {{max}} characters
errors.VOICE_SOURCE_REQUIRED: Voice sample or voice description is required
errors.VOICE_PROMPT_TOO_LONG: Voice description must be at most {{max}} characters
errors.VOICE_SAMPLE_BOTH: Provide either voice sample URL or file, not both
errors.VOICE_SAMPLE_TOO_LARGE: Voice sample must be at most {{maxMB}} MB
errors.API_KEY_NOT_CONFIGURED: MINIMAX API key is not configured
errors.RATE_LIMIT: Rate limit triggered — please retry later
errors.AUTH_FAILED: Authentication failed — check your API key
errors.NO_COVER_FEATURE_DATA: No cover feature data returned from MiniMax
errors.NO_AUDIO_URL: No audio URL returned from MiniMax
errors.NO_FILE_ID: No file ID returned from MiniMax upload
errors.VOICE_SAMPLE_FETCH_FAILED: Failed to fetch voice sample from URL

errors.NO_TTS_AUDIO: No audio URL returned from MiniMax text-to-speech
